name: Melbourne
industries: The Big Build infrastructure program, banking and insurance, health sciences and a strong tech scene share Melbourne's market.
intro: Melbourne pairs Australia's biggest infrastructure program with its liveliest digital economy: the Big Build's rail tunnels and level-crossing removals employ program talent in volume, while the city's banks, insurers and health networks run transformation portfolios of their own. Victoria's government sector adds steady certified-role demand. Scrum credentials carry the tech scene from Cremorne to Docklands; PMP anchors the infrastructure and corporate side. Our current batches run live online on the IST schedule — 1:30 PM – 10:30 PM Melbourne time, finishing late enough that we hold this page as off-hours and say so plainly. Register interest for APAC-hours batches to be notified first. Constant throughout: live weekend instruction, exam application guidance, calibrated mocks, and trainer access until certification. Recent cohorts have mixed Big Build contractors with bank delivery leads, to everyone's benefit.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Melbourne?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 01:30 PM – 10:30 PM GMT+10 in Melbourne. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Melbourne?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Melbourne. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Australia?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Australia and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Melbourne sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Australia accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Melbourne — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Melbourne: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
